title: Post-M8 localization hardening
summary: Harden zh-CN/en player localization defaults, manual settings, missing-key gates and hardcoded player-visible string coverage after the owner reports mixed language UI.
acceptance: Chinese browser/system candidates default to zh-CN; non-Chinese candidates default to en
Manual language switching persists without save schema or Worker mutation
Player-visible strings in default HUD, menu, settings, actions, feedback and onboarding use localization keys
Missing zh-CN/en player keys fail tests; English diagnostics remain isolated behind debug surfaces
Hardcoded player-facing string audit is updated and reviewer-verifiable

history.details: Localized current Web shell fixture-backed player HUD/start-surface strings via a narrow UI-side adapter, moved player input/connectors to localization keys, extended fixture localization validation, added zh-CN HUD leak tests, and restored refreshed WM-0118 artifacts because they are outside WM-0134 allowedPaths.

changes_requested: Medium: packages/ui-react/src/shell-hud.test.ts imports apps/web/src/product-gate-fixture through a relative cross-workspace path, creating a reversed internal dependency from @wuming-town/ui-react to @wuming-town/web and violating AGENTS/ADR-0001 package-boundary contracts. Other reviewed localization behavior and gates pass; corepack pnpm test --filter web-shell remains a documented repo-script mismatch.

Review fix: removed the reverse ui-react test dependency on apps/web product-gate fixture, replaced it with a local minimal read-model slice in shell-hud.test.ts, reran quality/boundary checks, and kept the fixture-localization hardening plus WM-0118 artifact restores intact.

verified: No blocking findings in round 2; prior ui-react reverse dependency on apps/web/product-gate-fixture is removed, localization gates and supported web-shell e2e pass, WM-0118 artifacts are clean, and the pnpm test --filter web-shell runner mismatch remains documented as a non-blocking repo-script issue.
Integrated verified post-M8 localization hardening after handoff, taskctl, diff and corepack pnpm quality gates passed.

forbiddenPaths: locale state in sim-core, sim-worker, sim-protocol or save schema
broad Electron filesystem or IPC APIs
telemetry, accounts, hosted services or public privacy claims

review.summary: No blocking findings in round 2; prior ui-react reverse dependency on apps/web/product-gate-fixture is removed, localization gates and supported web-shell e2e pass, WM-0118 artifacts are clean, and the pnpm test --filter web-shell runner mismatch remains documented as a non-blocking repo-script issue.

integration.summary: Integrated verified post-M8 localization hardening after handoff, taskctl, diff and corepack pnpm quality gates passed.
